# Release title

Patch: CI yarn migration & docs fix

---

## Changelog

## [1.0.2] - 2026-05-07

### Fixed

- CI pipeline: switched from `npm ci` to `yarn install --frozen-lockfile` to match the project's yarn lockfile

### Changed

- Updated `npx` script name in README from `tic-tac-toe-core` to `t3core`

### Docs

- Added `PUBLISHING.md` with step-by-step npm publish instructions
- Committed `yarn.lock` for deterministic installs
